description_long: This object is a historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden carriage with four solid wheels. The cannon barrel is long, cylindrical, and made of dark metal, featuring a flared muzzle and reinforced breech. The carriage is constructed from heavy wooden planks, with metal fittings and bolts securing the structure. The wheels are also wooden with metal rims, designed for limited mobility on flat surfaces. There are metal rings and brackets on the carriage, likely for maneuvering or securing the cannon. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, with no visible modern features or embellishments.
description: A large, dark metal cannon mounted on a sturdy wooden wheeled carriage, featuring a long barrel and reinforced fittings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle of the cannon and the alignment of the four wheels beneath the wooden carriage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cannon barrel, the wooden carriage, and the two visible wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the breech of the cannon, the back of the carriage, and the wheel arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the barrel, carriage details, and the other set of wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the wooden carriage.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; surfaces are solid black and brown.
